import { Checklist } from '@/components/mdx/Checklist'

export const metadata = {
  title: "Anime Paradox Units Guide: Best Characters & Tier List 2026",
  description: "Master Anime Paradox with our comprehensive units guide for 2026. Discover the best DPS, support, and beginner units, their passives, and optimal farming strategies to dominate the game.",
  category: "Guide",
  image: "https://placehold.co/800x400/8B5CF6/fff?text=Anime+Paradox+Units",
  date: "2026-02-01",
  author: "Anime Paradox Wiki Team"
}

<Callout type="info" title="Quick Guide">
- Prioritize **Anime Paradox units guide** for meta DPS like Storrk and Zid, but they are extremely rare.
- **Bulma** is a must-have for efficient gold farming in all stages.
- **Oroheme** (Our Heroine) is the top pure healer, crucial for survivability in tough stages.
- **Sun Jin Wu** and **Igrus** form a powerful DPS synergy, especially in Infinite modes.
- For beginners, **Kilawa** and **Broly** offer strong early-game progression and damage potential.
- **Legend stages** are the best for repeatable gem farming and acquiring Ichigo.
</Callout>

Welcome, aspiring Paradox players! Navigating the vast world of Anime Paradox requires a keen understanding of its diverse unit roster. From devastating damage dealers to indispensable support characters and efficient farmers, choosing and developing the right units is paramount to your success. This **Anime Paradox units guide** for 2026 will equip you with the knowledge to assemble an unbeatable team, optimize your progression, and conquer even the most challenging content the game has to offer. We'll delve into the meta, break down individual unit strengths, and reveal the best strategies for both new and veteran players.

<Section icon={Trophy} title="Mastering the Meta: Top-Tier DPS Units">
Understanding the current meta is crucial for achieving peak performance in Anime Paradox. The game features a dynamic roster of damage-per-second (DPS) units, each with unique strengths and optimal use cases. From full-map area-of-effect (AOE) specialists to scaling powerhouses, selecting the right DPS can drastically alter your gameplay experience.

**Video Highlights:**
- Overview of current meta units and their passives.
- Breakdown of S+ tier units: Storrk and Zid.
- Discussion on S-tier DPS units like Sun Jin Wu and Igrus.
- Insights into A-tier options such as Broly and Kilawa.

<YouTubeEmbed videoId="nng_XTy8_Hk" title="Anime Paradox META Tier List (All Units & Passives) | Best Units in Roblox Anime Paradox" />

### S+ Tier: Unparalleled Powerhouses

These units represent the absolute pinnacle of damage output and utility, capable of dominating any stage. However, their rarity often makes them a significant investment.

| Unit Name           | Rarity/Source      | Key Strengths                                  | Ranking Notes                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| :------------------ | :----------------- | :--------------------------------------------- | :-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Storrk (Resurreccion)** | Paradox Banner     | **Highest overall DPS**, absurd health, range, Metralleta nuke | The strongest unit with best stats; effectively hits the entire map by chasing enemies. Metralleta nuke deals massive damage to bosses and clears waves. Extremely rare (0.001% chance).                                                                                       |
| **Zid (Atomic)**          | Secret Banner      | **Full-map AOE DPS**, massive tankiness, high damage ceiling | One of the top 3 best units. Once upgraded to All Range Atomic, attacks the entire map. Exceptional survivability and damage output. Heavy investment but game-changing.                                                                                                    |

<Callout type="warning" title="Rarity Alert">
Both Storrk and Zid are incredibly rare units, often requiring significant gem investment or extreme luck to acquire. While they are meta-defining, players should not feel pressured to obtain them to clear all content.
</Callout>

### S Tier: Elite Damage Dealers

These units offer exceptional damage and scaling, often with unique mechanics that make them indispensable in specific game modes or team compositions.

| Unit Name             | Rarity/Source         | Key Strengths                                             | Ranking Notes                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| :-------------------- | :-------------------- | :-------------------------------------------------------- | :---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Sun Jin Wu (Monarch)** | Raid Act 3 Secret     | **Insane scaling** through kills, executes enemies, thrives in Infinite modes | Extremely powerful DPS. Gains permanent buffs on kill goals (damage, CDR, lifesteal, execute threshold). Executes non-boss enemies below 5% HP (scales to 80% at 250 kills). Best potential with Igrus for double kill stacks. Self-buffs damage/CDR/lifesteal on low HP.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| **Igrus (Elite Knight)** | Siege Shop Secret     | Strong bleed damage, self-healing, **excellent synergy with SJW** | Stacks 10% damage per kill (up to 100%). Deals heavy bleed damage and has self-heal. Crucially, synergizes with Sun Jin Wu: deals more damage to enemies above 40% HP (for SJW's execute) and gains additional damage/CDR when SJW is placed. A lower scaling ceiling than SJW in very long runs, but essential for SJW's full power.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| **Ichuga (Vasto Lorde)** | Legend Stage Secret   | Massive bleed DPS, strong self-sustain, tankiness, boss damage | Excellent unit from Legend stages. Passives include Vizor Surge (health restore, damage buff), Getsuga Bleed (on-hit bleed), and an enhanced Raging Zero nuke against bosses (500% damage, 150% bonus damage for 20s). Great survivability and strong against bosses, though may get outscaled in extremely long modes compared to SJW.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |

<CardGrid cols={3}>
  <Card title="Sun Jin Wu: Infinite Mode King">
    - **Unrivaled scaling** in long runs.
    - Execute mechanic for quick clears.
    - **Requires Igrus** for maximum efficiency.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Igrus: The Synergy Enabler">
    - Strong standalone DPS with bleed.
    - **Doubles SJW's stacking potential**.
    - Essential support for top-tier SJW teams.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Ichuga: Boss Slayer">
    - **High burst damage** against bosses.
    - Reliable self-sustain and tankiness.
    - Great for clearing Legend stages.
  </Card>
</CardGrid>

### A Tier: Reliable & Versatile DPS

These units are strong and reliable, offering solid performance across various content. They might have limitations like cooldowns or setup requirements but are excellent choices when higher-tier units are unavailable.

| Unit Name           | Rarity/Source      | Key Strengths                                        | Ranking Notes                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| :------------------ | :----------------- | :--------------------------------------------------- | :-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Brolu (Super)**   | Banner Mythic      | **Excellent AOE DPS**, infinite damage stacking      | One of the best Mythics. Ramps damage infinitely on kill (4% per kill for 60s), doubling buff at 100% damage. Exceptional for Raid and Infinite modes, where he can surpass even secret units. A personal favorite for many due to his insane stacking potential.                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| **Kirrua (Godspeed)** | Banner Mythic      | **High attack speed**, stuns, strong damage scaling, easy EVO | Very fast unit, great for clearing Legend stages. Gains damage and CDR every 8 attacks. Stuns enemies for 0.5s and applies Shock (10% more damage). Easy to evolve by purchasing essences from the shop, making him a great starter unit that can last into the endgame.                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| **Sky (Enhanced)**  | Banner Mythic      | Resource meter for enhanced abilities, damage/CDR buff | Similar to Storrk but without summons and lower damage. Builds a resource meter on hit, activating "Limit Break" at 100% for 100% damage and 30% CDR for 16s. Limit Break requirement reduces over time. A decent alternative if you can't get Storrk, offering strong burst windows.                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| **Freezo (Full Power)** | Banner Mythic      | Strong AOE damage, burn application, map presence    | Gains 60% damage for 80 seconds every 20 seconds he stays on the map, making him more powerful over time. Good for stages where units can remain active for extended periods. Applies burn damage.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |

<Callout type="tip">
**Broly's Infinite Potential:** In modes like Infinite or Raid, Broly can become the strongest unit in the game due to his infinitely stacking damage. Focus on maximizing his kill count early to snowball his power.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Shield} title="Essential Support & Farm Units">
Beyond raw damage, a balanced team in Anime Paradox relies heavily on effective support and farming units. These characters ensure your survival, boost your DPS, and keep your economy thriving, allowing for faster progression and easier clears.

### Must-Have Farm Units

These units are non-negotiable for efficient resource generation, which is the backbone of unit upgrades and summoning.

| Unit Name         | Rarity/Source      | Key Role        | Ranking Notes
